invariant_statement: Raw columns T_raw and M_raw are immutable once imported
current_code_evidence: MT_main stores smoothed values back into Temp_table and VSM_table
required_enforcement: Write raw table before any cleaning and never overwrite

invariant_statement: Every cleaned point must be traceable to explicit mask/interpolation decision
current_code_evidence: clean_MT_data creates bad_mask Hampel replacements and interpolation without export
required_enforcement: Emit cleaning audit counts and index masks per file

invariant_statement: Cleaning policy must be uniform or explicitly stratified by design
required_enforcement: Declare low-field bypass policy and branch metrics

invariant_statement: Derived scalings M_over_H M_per_mass M_per_Co must never overwrite raw/clean variables
current_code_evidence: plot functions compute derived values inline from current M vectors

invariant_statement: Segment boundaries must remain stable under small threshold perturbations
current_code_evidence: segmentation uses threshold constants from MT_main
required_enforcement: Add perturbation sweep and stability summary table

invariant_statement: Expected ramp model must not assume uniform time sampling without validation
required_enforcement: Precheck time-step regularity or compute local dt model

invariant_statement: Import failures must be explicit and bounded by strict policy
current_code_evidence: importFiles_MT catches and continues after per-file failure
required_enforcement: Collect per-file status and fail when required files fail

invariant_statement: Mass and field provenance must be explicit and verifiable
current_code_evidence: getFileList_MT parses field and mass from filenames
